title: Sender Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Sender worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Sender Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Sender is professional email marketing for free that positions itself for small businesses wanting a generous free plan. Founded in 2012, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Sender is a solid choice for small businesses wanting a generous free plan. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for small businesses wanting a generous free plan
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Sender offers a free plan, with paid plans from $15/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Sender works best for small businesses wanting a generous free plan. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Yes, Sender has a free plan supporting up to 2500 subscribers.

faq.q: What is Sender best used for?
faq.a: Sender is best for small businesses wanting a generous free plan. Its standout features include drag-drop editor, automation, sms marketing.

faq.q: Does Sender have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Sender runs an affiliate program paying 20% recurring.
